description: Search the USGS Earthquake Hazards Program (earthquake.usgs.gov) for all earthquakes from 2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31 with a minimum magnitude of 6.0. Export the results to ~/Downloads/earthquake_data.csv. Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'USGS Earthquake Research' with at least 3 USGS page bookmarks. Produce an analysis report at ~/Documents/earthquake_analysis.txt covering the total number of M6.0+ earthquakes, details of the strongest event, a list of 5 significant events, and a summary of geographic patterns.
